mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT P.ITEM_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(P.ITEM_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS ITEM_NAME FROM AR_ITEM_PARAM P INNER JOIN AR_ITEM I ON P.ITEM_NO = I.ITEM_NO WHERE P.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND I.ITEM_GROUP_CODE = '1433'
AND I.ITEM_GROUP_CODE <> '1433'
ORDER BY P.ITEM_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_ITEM_PARAM ( AR_PARAM_NO, GROUP_NO, UNIT_VALUE, MIN_VALUE, MAX_VALUE, DEPEND_ITEM, REPLACE_ITEM, CARD_FLAG, CARD_FROM_FLAG, CARD_FROM_OFFSET, CARD_FROM_RELATION, CARD_TO_FLAG, CARD_TO_OFFSET, CARD_TO_RELATION, APPLY_FLAG, APPLY_TYPE, APPLY_FULLDAY_VALUE, APPLY_CARD_PRIORITY, DATE_TYPE, CPNY_ID, ITEM_NO, UNIT, DETAIL_CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY ) VALUES ( #{arParamNo}, #{groupNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitValue, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{minValue, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maxValue, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dependItem, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replaceItem, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardFlag, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cardFromFlag, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cardFromOffset, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cardFromRelation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardToFlag, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cardToOffset, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cardToRelation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyFlag, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applyType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyFulldayValue, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applyCardPriority, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dateType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unit, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detailContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
